scope: LK OS Phase 8 safe automation readiness registry

candidates.name: Daily Sales Brief read-only
candidates.trigger: Every business morning or on demand
candidates.silent_ok_contract: If generated successfully with no material anomaly, stay silent or save to Brain only; alert only on relevant sales/stock anomaly.
rollback_plan: delete generated local report if wrong
no external state to revert in dry-run mode
candidates.dry_run_test: Run the existing read-only briefing script/report generation manually and verify no PII/secrets before any recurring delivery.
candidates.recommended_next_step: Run 3 manual dry-runs on separate days before cron approval.

candidates.name: Weekly CEO Review read-only
candidates.silent_ok_contract: Save report quietly; alert Lucas only if P0/P1 decisions are generated or data source is stale.
rollback_plan: mark report superseded if methodology wrong
candidates.dry_run_test: Generate next weekly review locally with Shopify+GA4+Tiny read-only and compare source freshness labels.
candidates.recommended_next_step: Candidate for first read-only cron after one more clean manual run.

candidates.name: SEO/CRO weekly monitor read-only
candidates.silent_ok_contract: Alert only when new P1/P2 SEO opportunity or Merchant issue appears; do not auto-write Shopify.
alert_conditions: PDP traffic high with zero/low conversion
rollback_plan: no Shopify rollback because writes are blocked
candidates.dry_run_test: Run Search Console, Merchant, PDP low-conversion routers manually and confirm writes_allowed_now=0.
candidates.recommended_next_step: Safe as read-only monitor only after Lucas approves cadence/delivery.

candidates.name: Approval Learning Ledger refresh
candidates.cadence_candidate: on-demand or post-PR hook, not time-based initially
candidates.silent_ok_contract: No message unless a pending item changes status or a contradiction is detected.
alert_conditions: executed item appears again as needs_approval
pending_future item is proposed for execution
candidates.dry_run_test: Regenerate ledger locally and compare counts/status with source artifacts.
candidates.recommended_next_step: Keep as manual post-action step until ledger pattern stabilizes.

candidates.name: Klaviyo CRM draft watcher
candidates.trigger: CRM/RFM segment or campaign draft changes
candidates.silent_ok_contract: No automatic send; only surface draft readiness/risks.
rollback_plan: revert draft metadata only after preview
candidates.dry_run_test: List campaign/draft IDs read-only and produce readiness packet without UI deep links unless verified.
activation_blockers: Requires platform-specific safe Klaviyo read-only implementation and Lucas approval
candidates.recommended_next_step: Do not automate yet; keep on-demand readiness preview.

candidates.name: On-demand sourcing router
candidates.silent_ok_contract: No background full-sync; run only for named approved item and return preview.
rollback_plan: no supplier contact without separate approval
candidates.dry_run_test: Given one approved mock decision, generate a no-contact lookup plan and verify no network contact/send occurs.
activation_blockers: Needs explicit Lucas/Júlio approval per item
candidates.recommended_next_step: Wait for one specific sourcing approval; do not create cron.

global_activation_gates: At least one clean manual dry-run for each automation before approval request.
Secret/PII scan clean on generated artifacts.
Rollback/pause command documented before cron/n8n activation.
Silent-OK contract defined: no spam when everything is normal.
Medium/high risk automations require explicit Lucas approval with cadence and delivery target.
